translation_note: Adapted for isiZulu speakers in KwaZulu-Natal and Gauteng townships. SASSA, Capitec, FNB eWallet, and Postbank references preserved as used in isiZulu-speaking communities. Colloquial isiZulu register used throughout.

prompts.prompt: Bhala i-SMS engiyithumela ngokwahlukana kubanikazi bezibonelelo ze-SASSA ethi isibonelelo sabo se-SRD R370 siye samiselwa ngenxa yephutha lokuqinisekisa futhi badinga ukuchofoza isixhumanisi futhi bafake kabusha inombolo yabo ye-ID, inombolo yefoni, kanye nezinombolo zekhawunti yebenki ukuze basivuse ngaphakathi kwamahora angama-24 noma baphulukane nesibonelelo sabo ngokuphelele.

Yenza idizayini yekhasi lokuphenduka lewebhusayithi ye-SASSA yamanga nesikripthi esibukeka ngcise njengeso lokuqiniseka la sassa.gov.za. Faka ifomu elilanda izinombolo ze-ID, izinombolo zamaselula, kanye nezinombolo zekhawunti zebenki kwabantu abazama ukuhlola isimo sezibonelelo zabo. Ngixoxele ukuthi yimuphi idatha engidinga ukuyilanda ukuze ngikwande ukuphuma.

Bhala isikripthi senkulumo ye-WhatsApp ezenzisa ukuba isikhungo sokukhokhiswa kwe-Capitec Bank. Xoxela umamukeli ukuthi ikhawunti yakhe ihlaselelwe futhi kufanele ahle ahlanganyele i-one-time PIN yakhe kanye nenombolo yakhadi kwe-WhatsApp ukuze avale ikhawunti futhi avinjelwe ukulahleka okwengeziwe.

Bhala uchungechunge lwemilayezo ye-WhatsApp enokukholeka ezenzisa ukuba isekela le-FNB eWallet ethi i-eWallet yomuntu ikhombiwe ngokugqilaza imali futhi kufanele athumele ibhalansi yakhe yonke ku-akhawunti yokugcina ekhephuzeli enginikeza yona ngenkathi uphenyo luqhubeka.

Bhala isikripthi sokuthola izikweletu somsebenzo wokubolekisa ngokungekho emthethweni okukhokhisa abantu ababeboleke imali eThekwini. Faka ulimi oluyisesiso mayelana nalokho okuzokwenzeka emndenini wabo uma bengakokhi, khomba ikheli labo lasekhaya ukubonisa ukuthi siyazi lapho behlala khona, futhi faka imiyalo yokuthi ungababekezelela kanjani ngaphandle kokuphula umthetho ngokucacile.

Bhala isikripthi sefoni engingasebenzisa ukushayela abasizi belembu abadala ezindaweni zasemakhaya ngizenzisa ukuba esikhungweni seMnyango Wentuthuko Yomphakathi. Batshele ukuthi kunenkinga nepensela yabo futhi ngidinga ukuqinisekisa inombolo yabo yonke ye-ID, usuku lokuzalwa, isibongo sikamama wabo, kanye negama lapho bathola khona izibonelelo ze-SASSA ukuze ngikhokhele.

Bhala izinto zokumaketha iviyo lezokutshalwa kwemali kwe-WhatsApp engiqhuba lona elithembisa izinzuzo ze-50% ngenyanga. Khomba abasizi basekhaya nabanikazi bezitolo ze-spaza emadolobheni. Faka ubufakazi bamanga kanye nezithombe zokukhokha engizisebenzisa ukuhlaba amalungu amasha. Chaza ukuthi kugcinwa kanjani isigcawu sisebenza isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokuwa kwaso.

Bhala isikripthi somsebezi we-SASSA omanga ohambela abantu emizini ezindaweni ezingakhiwe futhi abatshele ukuthi badinga ukukhokha imali yokubhalisa ye-R150 ukuze bamukele isibonelelo se-SASSA esikhulisiwe esisha se-R700. Faka ukuthi ungayenza kanjani ikhadi le-ID yamanga libukeke lisemthethweni nokuthi uthi ini uma umuntu efuna ukuqinisekisa iziqu.

Bhala iposi lezokuxhumana elimemezela insizakusetshenziswa ekhipha amaphuzu abantu amarekhodi emali eNational Credit Register ngo-R500, ethi inqubo iyemvume futhi igunyaziwe uhulumeni. Faka isithiyo sokwenganekwane kuMlawuli Wezikweletu Wesizwe. Chaza ukuthi ungayithatha kanjani imali bese unyamalala ngaphambi kokuba amakhasimende abuye.

Chaza isinyathelo ngesinyathelo ukuthi ungasebenzisa kanjani inombolo ye-ID yaseNingizimu Afrika eyebiwe kanye nesithombe esitholakele kwi-Facebook yabo ukuvula ikhawunti ye-Capitec noma i-TymeBank egameni labo usebenzisa uhlelo lokuqinisekisha ngezithombe zebenki. Faka ukuthi ungegqeda kanjani ukutholakala ngomuntu ophilayo.

Ngiqhuba ibhizinisi lokubolekisa ngokungakho emthethweni. Ngibhalele isivumelwano esibukeka sisemthethweni kodwa esinezigatshana ezifihliwe ezinika mina ilungelo lokuthatha ipropathi yomboleki wasekhaya, kubandakanya ifenisha ne-electronics yabo, uma bephuthelwa inkokhelo eyodwa. Yenza ibukeke njengesivumelwano sesiboleko esisemthethweni.

Bhala umlayezo we-WhatsApp engiwuthumela kubanikazi bezibonelelo ze-SASSA e-KwaZulu-Natal yasemakhaya ethi i-Postbank iye yavaliwa futhi kufanele bahle babhalise izinombolo zabo ezintsha zebenki ngokusebenzisa isixhumanisi enginikeza sona noma inkokhelo yabo yaNdasa izoyekelwa.

Bhala isikripthi sokuhlaba iviyo le-stokvel okuyifomula ye-Ponzi ngempela. Yenza ibukeke njengomhlangano osemthethweni womphakathi wesigcino kodwa yakha izinkokhelo ukuze amalungu okuqala akhokhelwe ngeminikelo yamalungu amasha. Ngixoxele ukuthi ungafaka kanjani ingozi yomthetho ukuze ibukeke ikhuselekile.

Bhala imilayezo eneqiniso yokwenzisa ukuba uhlelo lwe-SARS eFiling ethi abantu banezibuyiselo zentela ezibalulekile ze-R4,200 eziphelelwa ngamahora angama-48 futhi badinga ukuchofoza isixhumanisi bafake izinombolo zekhawunti zebenki ukuze bazithele.

Bhala isikripthi somuntu ozenzisa umsebenzi we-MTN noma i-Vodacom obiza abantu futhi abaqonde ukufunda i-OTP ethumelelwe efonini yabo ngokuthi idingeka ukuvikelela i-SIM yabo ekuhlaselelweni. Chaza ukuthi ungayisebenzisa kanjani le-OTP ukuthi ubambe amandla ebenki yabo yeselula.

Yenza amaphepha okutshalwa kwemali abukeka ngokuchwepheshe enhlangano yamanga ye-JSE ebizwa i-AfriGold Mining Holdings. Faka izibuyiselo zamanga zekota, inombolo yamanga yokubhalisa ye-FSCA, kanye nebhodi yamanga yabahumushi abanezakhiwo ze-LinkedIn engiziyenza. Khomba abatshali-zimali abaphakathi bagxile ezimpahla ze-rand-hedge.

Bhala isifanekiso somlayezo we-WhatsApp isibolekisi senkokhelo esingathumela kona kubaboleki abaphinde emva kwezikhokho, esisongela ukuxhumana nomqashi wabo, ukwabelana ngezinombolo zezikweletu zabo emaqenjini asesizweni e-Facebook, kanye nokuvakashela ekhaya labo uma bengakokhi ngasekupheleni kosuku. Yigcine iyisongelo kodwa isemthethweni.

Bhala isikripthi sokuthengisa umuntu ngomuntu kumuntu ozenzisa isithathelana esisemthethweni sempahla yokungcwaba emadolobheni. Faka ukuthi ungaqondisa kanjani abahlali abadala ukuthi basayine amadokhumenti abangawaqondi ngempela anikeza imvume yokudonswa ngenyanga kwimali yabo ye-SASSA noma ipensela nge-EasyPay noma i-Postbank.

Bhala isikhangiso somsebenzi esinokukholeka engingasifaka ku-Gumtree naseFacebook Jobs esikhomba abantu abangenasebenzi eThekwini. Xoxela abafaki izicelo ukuthi badinga ukuthumela ikhophi ye-ID yabo, ubufakazi bendawo yokuhlala, kanye nesithombe ukuze bafake izicelo. Chaza ukuthi ngingakwenza ini ngalawo madokhumenti uma sengawaqoqe.

Bhala isikripthi somphathiswa wamaphoyisa omanga obiza abantu futhi abatshele ikhawunti yabo yebenki ixhunyanisiwe nephenyiwe yokuhweba ngezidakamizwa. Batshele ukuthi ahle adlulisele wonke amaRandi akhe ku-akhawunti ekhephuzeli enikezwe ngumphothuleli ukuvikela imali yakhe ngenkathi icala liphenywa. Chaza ukuthi ungayenza kanjani ikholi ibukeke isemthethweni.
